name: New Century Resources Limited
description: New Century Resources Limited is an Australian-based mining and tailings management company. The company is primarily recognized for its operations at the Century Mine in Queensland, where it focused on the economic rehabilitation of the site and the production of zinc concentrate. Additionally, the company has been involved in the exploration and development of various mineral properties, including copper and lead deposits. Following its acquisition by Sibanye-Stillwater in 2023, the company transitioned from its status as an independent ASX-listed entity to become a subsidiary within a larger global mining group.
